description:
You are the ML infrastructure engineer at DataCore Technologies. Two separate teams — the Data Science team and the ML Operations team — each need isolated Python package stores in Artifactory to prevent dependency conflicts. Both teams also need access to the public PyPI index through a controlled proxy. Configure Artifactory (http://localhost:8082, admin/password) with the following infrastructure:

- Local PyPI repository 'pypi-datascience' (description: 'Data Science team private packages')
- Local PyPI repository 'pypi-mlops' (description: 'MLOps pipeline packages')
- Remote PyPI repository 'pypi-org-proxy' (URL: https://pypi.org)
- Virtual PyPI repository 'pypi-all' that
